description: Public Mercado Livre search API — query products across BR/AR/MX marketplaces. Free, no auth required for product search and item lookup.

search.notes: Search products on Mercado Livre Brasil (MLB). Pass q=<query> and optional limit (default 10). Returns titles, prices, condition, seller, thumbnails.

item.notes: Item details by Mercado Livre id (e.g. MLB1234567890). Used after search to get full description and seller stats.
